parserNotes: Found 13 transactions for Citadel Share 0070 (Victoria Wise utility + shared account). Account opened 11/15/2025 with $1.00. Primary purpose: Delmarva Utility payments (4 payments totaling $723.66) and receiving transfers from Share 0000. This is a separate account from Victoria's main savings (Share 0000) — used specifically as a utility bill-pay account. Marked assignedTo: joint as this is identified as a shared account between Gabriel and Victoria. Delmarva Utility is the electric utility serving Delaware/Maryland — bills escalating each month (Nov $112, Jan $144, Feb $210, Mar $258) suggesting a property with increasing energy use. Large student loan payment of $3,000 on 12/16 — significant one-time payment from this account. Two branch deposits on 12/12 ($1,868 + $500 = $2,368) — source unknown, flagged. Transfer pairs: PAIR_A (12/20 to Share 0000 $1,000), PAIR_B (01/03 from Share 0000 $200), PAIR_C (01/05 from Share 0000 $100), PAIR_D (02/06 from Share 0000 $400).
